title: Casting test case
body:
Casting test case. Results in
```
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: t/t_cast_param_logic.v:19:28: Unsupported: static cast to 'data_t[7:0]' from 'data_t[7:0]'
                                                : ... In instance t
   19 |     always_comb out_data = in_data_t'(in_data); 
      |                            ^~~~~~~~~
                    ... For error description see https://verilator.org/warn/UNSUPPORTED?v=5.003
```

Issue closed here: https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/3777
